pi_items.source: Task script setup_task.sh and install_astroimagej.sh download path
Task script export_result.sh which reads this exact path
Task instructs calibrating 10 pixels = 1.0 arcsec (0.1 arcsec/pixel) and drawing a 30-arcsecond scale bar. 30 / 0.1 = 300 pixels.
Task instructions explicitly require applying the 'Fire' false-color Look-Up Table
Task instructions set 10 px = 1.0 arcsec, and extracted CD matrix from real FITS header (CD1_1: 1.878e-5, CD2_1: -2.029e-5) yields ~0.0995 arcsec/px.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real Hubble Space Telescope WFPC2 imagery of the Eagle Nebula (H-alpha, 656 nm), downloaded from esahubble.org. The required 30-arcsecond scale bar correctly translates to 300 pixels based on the calibrated ~0.1 arcsec/pixel plate scale (calculated from the real FITS CD matrix as 0.0995). The output path, target FITS path, and the 'Fire' LUT requirement match the task instructions and evaluation scripts.
